{ "name": "predis/predis", "type": "library", "description": "A flexible and feature-complete Redis/Valkey client for PHP.", "keywords": ["nosql", "redis", "predis"], "homepage": "http://github.com/predis/predis", "license": "MIT", "support": { "issues": "https://github.com/predis/predis/issues" }, "authors": [ { "name": "Till Krüss", "homepage": "https://till.im", "role": "Maintainer" } ], "funding": [ { "type": "github", "url": "https://github.com/sponsors/tillkruss" } ], "require": { "php": "^7.2 || ^8.0" }, "require-dev": { "friendsofphp/php-cs-fixer": "^3.3", "phpstan/phpstan": "^1.9", "phpunit/phpunit": "^8.0 || ^9.4", "phpunit/phpcov": "^6.0 || ^8.0" }, "suggest": { "ext-relay": "Faster connection with in-memory caching (>=0.6.2)" }, "scripts": { "phpstan": "phpstan analyse", "style": "php-cs-fixer fix --diff --dry-run", "style:fix": "php-cs-fixer fix" }, "autoload": { "psr-4": { "Predis\\": "src/" } }, "config": { "sort-packages": true, "preferred-install": "dist" }, "minimum-stability": "dev", "prefer-stable": true }
